{{Quote|Blast him!|A B1 battle droid at the Battle of Muunilinst|<ref name="Clone Wars Chapter 20">{{CW|20}}</ref>}}
'''Voolvif Monn''' was a [[Shistavanen/Legends|Shistavanen]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served as a [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. After he was discovered to be strong in [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], Monn was taken as an infant from a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] near the [[Arah asteroid belt]] by a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] named [[Paouoish Rahhdool]]. Rahhdool took his new [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] back to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] to be trained in the ways of the [[Light side of the Force/Legends|light side of the Force]]. Monn proved a keen Jedi, eventually becoming a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] some time prior to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. He took the Jedi tradition of isolation and solitude to an extreme, standing aloof from his peers.

When the Clone Wars broke out in 22 BBY, Monn was one of a team of Jedi sent to [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]] to rescue [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]]. In the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|battle]] that ensued, he was one of few survivors, and his ability to cope against the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]] forces allowed him to ascend to the rank of Jedi Master. During the three year conflict between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] and the CIS, Monn participated in several more battles, including the [[Battle of Muunilinst/Legends|Battle of Muunilinst]], emerging on the victorious side in each of them.

==Biography==
===Jedi Knight===
Voolvif Monn was a [[Shistavanen/Legends|Shistavanen]] Wolfman, who was left orphaned as an infant on a desolate [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the vicinity of the [[Arah asteroid belt]]. His Shistavanen heritage gave him a keen sense as a hunter and tracker, and because he had no family, he was left to fend for himself. Monn was eventually discovered by a visiting [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] by the name of [[Paouoish Rahhdool]], who found that the young cubling had great potential in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. Monn was taken to be trained in the ways of the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], eventually passing his [[Jedi Trials/Legends|trials]] and becoming a full-fledged [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]],<ref name="DB" /> also becoming one of the few [[Shistavanen/Legends|Shistavanen]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]].<ref>{{SWMiniCite|set=Masters of the Force|pack=Voolvif Monn}}</ref>

Monn proved to be a committed and capable Jedi Knight. He mastered—and, some said, perfected—a rare [[Force power/Legends|Force power]] in which he used Force energy to create a barrier around himself that protected him from any attackers.<ref name="DB" /> Monn was also proficient with a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]], and could use his green-bladed weapon to fend off multiple enemies at any one time.<ref name="CW20" /> He also honed his hunting skills while a Jedi. The [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] dictated that none of their number should have any emotional attachments to others, be they Jedi or non-Jedi, though many skirted close to flouting these regulations when making friendships with their fellow trainees. Voolvif Monn, however, took the rule more seriously than his peers, and spent most of his time as a Jedi in solitude.<ref name="DB" />

===Battle of Geonosis===
[[File:Voolvif2.jpg|thumb|right|300px|Monn alongside his troops at the Battle of Muunilinst.]]
In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="The Essential Reader's Companion">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> Monn was stationed at the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] when a distress call was sent out by Jedi Knight [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] on the planet [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. Kenobi, along with Jedi Padawan [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]], had been captured by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] and were due to be executed. Jedi Master [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] led a [[Jedi assault team/Legends|team]] of over two hundred Jedi to Geonosis to rescue Skywalker, Kenobi, and Amidala from the leader of the Confederacy, [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]]<ref name=":0">{{Film|II}}</ref>—Monn was among them.<ref name="DB" />

The Jedi at the [[Petranaki arena]] were heavily outnumbered by [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]], and many [[Death/Legends|died]],<ref name=":0" /> though Monn, putting his shielding abilities to the test, was able to survive, and participated<ref name="DB" /> in the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]] after [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] arrived with backup, in the form of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]]. The Jedi and [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] were ultimately victorious,<ref name=":0" /> though many of Monn's fellow Jedi perished in the fighting.<ref name="DB" />

===Clone Wars===
The Battle of Geonosis was the first conflict in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]-spanning [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Due to the abilities he showed at Geonosis, Monn was elevated to the rank of Jedi Master so that he could command [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] in the war.<ref name="DB" /> Four months after Geonosis,<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> Monn and the [[Cloning/Legends|clones]] under his command were sent to [[Muunilinst/Legends|Muunilinst]] in order to wrest the planet from the control of [[San Hill/Legends|San Hill's]] [[InterGalactic Banking Clan/Legends|InterGalactic Banking Clan]] and to curb the production of CIS battle droids. After Republic forces bombarded the planet's main city, Monn led a group of clones into the city's main streets while Obi-Wan Kenobi and the [[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|elite clone unit]] known as [[The Muunilinst 10]] led an assault against the InterGalactic Banking Clan's main command center.<ref name="CW20" />

[[File:Voolvif3.jpg|thumb|left|300px|Monn during the Battle of Muunilinst.]]
His movements covered by clouds of smoke, Monn advanced toward the CIS forces alone, among remnants of the formerly great city that was now in ruins. When he eventually came into the view of the [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-Series battle droids]], the Shistavanen Wolfman charged at them as the droids began firing their [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]] at him. Monn was able to deflect any bolts that came near him, eventually leaping towards his enemies and cutting them down by the dozen. When Monn had fought off the first wave of droids, his [[Troop/Legends|troops]] arrived in [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|LAAT/i gunships]], dropping charges and deploying ground troops to deal with the remaining CIS forces. The [[Battle of Muunilinst/Legends|battle]] did not last long, however, as Kenobi was able to force the [[Muun/Legends|Muuns]] to surrender and shut down their droids. Monn celebrated with his troops, though he was soon at battle again.<ref name="CW20" />

Later in the war, during the [[Outer Rim Sieges/Legends|Outer Rim Sieges]], Monn and his fellow Jedi [[Agen Kolar/Legends|Agen Kolar]] and [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]] were dispatched to an ice-covered planet to fight CIS forces. However, the tide of the [[Battle of unidentified planet (bubble wort projectors)|battle]] went the way of the Separatists, and Monn, Kolar, and Secura were left to face several [[LM-432 crab droid/Legends|LM-432 crab droids]] armed with [[Bubble wort projector/Legends|bubble wort projectors]]. The Jedi did their best to defend themselves, but eventually became ensnared in the bubbles. They were saved by the arrival of Anakin Skywalker, who singlehandedly destroyed the droids and freed Monn and the two other Jedi.<ref name="CW22">{{CW|22}}</ref>

==Personality and traits==
[[File:Voolvif.jpg|thumb|right|300px|Voolvif Monn celebrating.]]
Voolvif Monn shunned the company of his fellow [[Sentience/Legends|sentients]] for the large majority of his life; he grew up in solitude in the Arah asteroid belt, honing his hunting and tracking skills during his time living there. As a Jedi, he took the Order's edict of detachment to an extreme, spending almost his entire time alone. He stood aloof from his peers, rarely speaking<ref name="DB" /> except for the joyous roars he let out after emerging victorious in combat.<ref name="CW20" /><ref name="CW22" />

As a result of his isolated lifestyle, Monn was regarded by other Jedi as something of an enigma, and few had the courage to approach and converse with the Jedi Master whom they felt was so mysterious.<ref name="DB" /> However, while he was an aloof, distant being, Monn was willing to enter combat when it was required of him, and he showed his bravery numerous times during the Clone Wars.<ref name="CW20" /><ref name="CW22" /> Monn had [[Color/Legends|grey]]-skin, black [[Eye/Legends|eye]]<nowiki/>s, brown [[Hair/Legends|hair]],<ref name="CW20" /> and stood at 1.83 [[Cubic meter/Legends|meters]].<ref name="DB" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Voolvif_Monn-Masters_of_the_Force.jpg|thumb|right|300px|Voolvif ready for a fight]]
Voolvif Monn was created as part of a [[Wikipedia:Cartoon Network|Cartoon Network]] poll to determine which of three new Jedi, each based on characters seen in the [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|cantina]] scene in [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']], should be introduced in the ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]'' television series. Monn won the contest, and appeared in "[[Chapter 20 (Star Wars: Clone Wars)|Chapter 20]]," though the other two contestants, [[Foul Moudama]] and [[Roron Corobb/Legends|Roron Corobb]], were later introduced as well.<ref name="poll" /><ref name="SW.com">{{SWArchive|url=collecting/news/gentlegiant/news20060306.html|text=Gentle Giant Toons Out the Original Trilogy}}</ref> Voolvif Monn's name resembles that of the Shistavanen Wolfman appearing in ''A New Hope'' from which his creation was inspired, whose original nickname was "Wolfman."<ref name="sw.com">{{SWArchive|url=episode-iv/bts/article/f20030502/index.html|text=Cantina Roll-Call: Shedding Light on Some Alien Aliases|int=Cantina Roll-Call: Shedding Light on Some Alien Aliases}}</ref>
